mapper.select:
SELECT r.id, r.reg_no AS regNo, r.patient_id AS patientId, p.name AS patientName, r.dept_id AS deptId, d.dept_name AS deptName, r.staff_id AS staffId, s.name AS staffName, sc.work_date AS workDate, sc.time_period AS timePeriod, r.reg_time AS regTime, r.reg_fee AS regFee, r.status, r.registrant_user_id AS registrantUserId, ru.real_name AS registrantUserName FROM registration r LEFT JOIN patient p ON p.id = r.patient_id LEFT JOIN dept d ON d.id = r.dept_id LEFT JOIN staff s ON s.id = r.staff_id LEFT JOIN schedule sc ON sc.id = r.schedule_id LEFT JOIN sys_user ru ON ru.id = r.registrant_user_id
AND (p.user_id = #{userId} OR r.registrant_user_id = #{userId})
AND r.patient_id = #{patientId} AND r.registrant_user_id = #{registrantUserId} AND r.staff_id = #{staffId} AND r.status = #{status}
ORDER BY r.reg_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (reg_no, patient_id, schedule_id, dept_id, staff_id, reg_time, reg_fee, status, cashier_id, registrant_user_id) VALUES (#{regNo}, #{patientId}, #{scheduleId}, #{deptId}, #{staffId}, #{regTime}, #{regFee}, #{status}, #{cashierId}, #{registrantUserId})
mapper.update: UPDATE registration SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
